title: X(g) / Y(g) segmentation fault
key_bug_features: selecting X(g) or Y(g) from geometry tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geoms (id INT PRIMARY KEY, g GEOMETRY NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE nodes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, g GEOMETRY DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO nodes (id, g) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'POINT(3 3)');
SELECT X(g) FROM geoms UNION SELECT Y(g) FROM nodes WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
